author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev, creator David DM http://david-dm.org, co-creator & organiser @NodeBotsUK & @MeteorLondon meetups. Owner TABLEFLIP https://tableflip.io
author.name: Alan Shaw

content.text: 🚨 Guess what? A brand new #JS #IPFS will set sail just in time for the Decentralized Web Summit 2018!!! \o/ js-ipfs 0.31 will add a sprinkling of connectivity magic 🧚 and support for raw leaves 🌿 in your DAGs. Wowzers!  @IPFSbot #DWebSummit #distributed #DAG #shipping
content.html: 🚨 Guess what? A brand new #JS #IPFS will set sail just in time for the Decentralized Web Summit 2018!!! \o/ js-ipfs 0.31 will add a sprinkling of connectivity magic 🧚 and support for raw leaves 🌿 in your DAGs. Wowzers! @IPFSbot #DWebSummit #distributed #DAG #shipping
